FuseNet Call for the Organisation of Min.summary: Supports organisation of focused mini-workshops to strengthen fusion education, networking and knowledge exchange across the FuseNet community.

FuseNet Support of Master Students in a.summary: Provides mobility support for master’s students to attend fusion educational events (schools, workshops), enhancing skills and professional networks.

FuseNet Support of Master Students going.summary: Funds international internships for master’s students in fusion-related labs/industry to gain hands-on experience and strengthen European talent pipelines.

New actions for skills and competences f.summary: Supports new training and competence-building actions for safe operation and innovation in nuclear technologies, including safety culture, regulation, and future workforce needs.

OFFERR Call.summary: Supports research and innovation actions under the OFFERR initiative as defined by the call text, typically targeting advanced methods, collaboration and demonstrators relevant to Euratom priorities.

SOFT Innovation Prize 2026.summary: Innovation prize recognising outstanding solutions in the SOFT context as defined by the call, incentivising impactful prototypes and transfer to practice.
